title: InteDesign 25PCS Artificial Rose Flowers with Stems for Wedding Decorations Fake Roses Flowers, Bridesmaid Bridal Bouquets Table Centrepiece and Wedding Car Decorations (Pink)
features: Premium Realistic Appearance:These exquisite artificial roses feature incredibly lifelike details with velvety petals and natural-looking stems. Available in three classic colors: white ,pink and red roses. The artificial white roses and artificial pink flowers perfectly mimic real blooms, making them ideal for wedding decorations. Each fake rose maintains its beauty indefinitely, serving as permanent flower decorations for any setting.

Versatile Decorative Applications:Perfect for creating stunning wedding bouquet arrangements, bridesmaid bouquet sets, and bride bouquet for wedding alternatives. The 25-piece set allows for abundant wedding flowers decorations, including wedding car decorations, table decorations centrepiece designs, and wedding cake flowers arrangements. The stems are bendable for custom table flowers decoration and flower cake decorations. Also suitable as artificial flowers for memorial displays.

Durable All-Weather Material:Crafted from high-quality silk and plastic materials, these artificial flowers outdoor are weather-resistant and suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. The foam roses bases provide stability in arrangements, while the artificial garden flowers design ensures they remain vibrant without watering or maintenance. These outdoor artificial flowers won't fade in sunlight, making them perfect for long-lasting displays.

Complete Wedding Package:This comprehensive set includes 25 full-stem artificial flowers with flexible stems that can be cut or shaped as needed. The package contains a mix of bloom sizes, from small artificial flowers for accent pieces to large artificial flowers for focal points. The artificial bouquet capability allows for creating bridesmaid flowers bouquets, glitter roses arrangements, or scattered rose petals effects for aisle decorations.

Cost-Effective & Reusable:Unlike fresh flowers, these fake flowers provide permanent beauty that can be reused for multiple events. The set offers exceptional value for wedding decorations on a budget, serving as beautiful wedding gifts for guests or venue decorations. The artificial flowers for decoration work for various occasions beyond weddings, including home decor, party settings, and commercial displays.
description: 25PCS Artificial Rose Flowers with Stems - Realistic Fake Roses for Wedding Decorations, Bridal Bouquets, and Table Centerpieces (White/Red/Pink) ✿Lifelike Look: Ultra-realistic artificial roses with velvety petals & natural stems in white, pink, or red. Perfect for permanent wedding or home decor. ✿Versatile Decor: Ideal for bouquets, centerpieces, cake toppers, and memorials. 25 pcs with bendable stems for custom designs. ✿ All-Weather durable: Fade-resistant, for indoor/outdoor use. No water or maintenance needed. ✿ Full Wedding Set: 25 flexible stems with mixed bloom sizes for bouquets or aisle petals. ✿ Budget-Friendly: Reusable for events, home, or commercial decorating. Great value vs. fresh flowers. Product Parameters: Material: Silk petals, plastic stems and leaves Quantity: 25 stems per set Stem Length: 7 inches (adjustable) Color Options: White/Red/Pink Features: Bendable stems, realistic texture Precautions: Avoid exposing to extreme heat sources Clean with soft cloth or gentle air dusting Store in dry conditions when not in use Keep away from direct flames or high heat These beautiful artificial rose flowers offer the perfect solution for elegant, maintenance-free decorations that capture the beauty of real roses without the fragility or cost of fresh flowers, making them ideal for wedding planners and decorators seeking timeless beauty.
